overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Star Wars video game showing a female protagonist walking with her small alien companion through an arid savanna landscape. The character descends a rocky hillside, traverses tall golden grasslands, and enters a narrow rocky canyon path under a dramatic partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky hillside with large succulent plants

agents.ego_description: descending a rocky hillside with large succulent plants, moving toward open grassland

notable_agents.action: small alien creature companion following closely behind the protagonist

entered.detail: reddish-brown rocky terrain with loose stones and sparse vegetation
large spiky aloe-like plants with red flower spikes
massive rock outcrops and mesas visible on the horizon
low structure visible in the valley below

segments.scene_description: The protagonist begins descending a rocky hillside dotted with large succulent plants. The camera follows from behind as she walks toward an open savanna landscape with distant rock formations visible under a partly cloudy sky.

events.description: transitions from rocky hillside into tall golden grass field

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall golden grass toward distant rock formations

notable_agents.action: small alien creature companion trotting behind through the grass

entered.detail: golden-yellow tall grass covering the savanna floor
small boulders and rock clusters scattered throughout the grassland

segments.scene_description: The character moves through an expansive savanna of tall golden grass. Scattered rocks dot the landscape while massive rock formations loom in the distance. The small companion creature follows closely as they traverse the open terrain.

events.description: reaches dirt path between large rock formations
enters narrow rocky canyon passage with walls closing in

agents.ego_description: walking along a dirt trail between rock walls, entering a narrow canyon

notable_agents.action: small alien creature companion following on the dirt path

entered.detail: reddish dirt trail winding between rock formations
tall reddish-brown rock walls forming a narrow passage
wooden post with markers indicating the trail direction

segments.scene_description: The protagonist reaches a dirt trail and enters a narrow rocky canyon. The tall grass gives way to bare rock walls that rise on both sides, partially obscuring the sky. A wooden trail marker stands beside the path as the character continues into the enclosed passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a high rocky vantage point down through an open savanna and into a confined canyon. It begins with the protagonist descending a rocky hillside dotted with succulent plants, moving toward a vast landscape under a partly cloudy sky. As she reaches the base, the scene expands into an expansive savanna of tall golden grass where she and her small companion traverse the open terrain toward distant rock formations. The environment then shifts as the grass gives way to a dirt trail, leading the camera into a narrow rocky canyon. Finally, the open horizon is replaced by towering rock walls that rise on both sides, passing a wooden trail marker as the character enters the enclosed passage.
